items.title: 台東海岸發光體事件
items.summary: 多名目擊者同時目擊橘色發光體於海面上方懸停約20分鐘。
items.observation: 橘色光體於海面方向低空位置保持近似靜止，目擊持續約20分鐘，期間亮度有變化。
items.observation_en: An orange light remained nearly stationary at low elevation over the sea for about 20 minutes, with changes in brightness.
items.review: 已確認多名目擊者敘述一致；仍需比對當晚船舶、航班、星象與氣象資料。
items.review_en: Multiple witness accounts are consistent. Marine traffic, flights, astronomy, and weather data still require review.
items.summary_en: Multiple witnesses observed an orange light hovering above the sea for about 20 minutes.

items.title: 桃園機場附近三角形飛行物
items.summary: 機師回報飛行途中目擊三角形無聲飛行物。
items.observation: 三名目擊者描述物體呈三角形、無明顯聲音，短時間內由機場周邊空域移出視線。
items.observation_en: Three witnesses described a triangular object with no obvious sound that left the airport-area field of view quickly.
items.review: 航空環境複雜，目前缺少原始影像與精確方位，尚無法排除常規航空器。
items.review_en: The aviation environment is complex. Without original media or precise bearing, conventional aircraft cannot be excluded.
items.summary_en: Pilots reported a silent triangular object during flight.

items.title: 陽明山連續目擊事件
items.summary: 連續三夜目擊相同形狀發光體，並成功拍攝到影像。
items.observation: 相近時間與方位連續三夜出現光體，目擊者提供影像供比對。
items.observation_en: A light appeared at a similar time and bearing on three consecutive nights, with witness media supplied for comparison.
items.review: 正在比對星象、山區固定光源、空中交通與影像拍攝參數。
items.review_en: Astronomy, fixed mountain lights, air traffic, and camera parameters are being compared.
items.summary_en: A similar light was observed on three consecutive nights and recorded on video.

items.title: 花蓮山區圓形壓痕事件
items.summary: 農民發現直徑約15公尺的完整圓形壓痕，樣本送驗中。
items.observation: 現場出現近圓形植被壓痕，尚無直接目擊飛行物或形成過程。
items.observation_en: A near-circular vegetation impression was found, with no direct sighting of an object or its formation.
items.review: 需優先排除農業作業、風害、人為活動與植被自然倒伏。
items.review_en: Agricultural activity, wind damage, human activity, and natural lodging must be excluded first.
items.summary_en: A farmer found a circular impression approximately 15 metres across; samples remain under review.
